use_cases: Showcasing product features with interactive reveal animations
Displaying product details in a visually engaging card format
Highlighting premium or featured products on landing pages
Creating anticipation and engagement through product reveal mechanics
Presenting product information in a compact, interactive format
ai_summary: A product reveal card component designed to showcase products with interactive click-to-reveal functionality. This card displays content dynamically, creating engaging user experiences for product showcases, feature reveals, or premium content presentations. Built with modern design principles suitable for e-commerce storefronts, SaaS product pages, and creator tool interfaces.
